section.heading: Definitions
section.chapeau: For the purposes of this chapter:

content.p: The term “servicemember” means a member of the uniformed services, as that term is defined in section 101(a)(5) of title 10.

subparagraph.chapeau: in the case of a servicemember who is a member of the Army, Navy, Air Force, Marine Corps, Space Force, or Coast Guard—

clause.content: active duty, as defined in section 101(d)(1) of title 10, and

in the case of a member of the National Guard, includes service under a call to active service authorized by the President or the Secretary of Defense for a period of more than 30 consecutive days under section 502(f) of title 32 for purposes of responding to a national emergency declared by the President and supported by Federal funds;

subparagraph.content: in the case of a servicemember who is a commissioned officer of the Public Health Service or the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, active service; and
any period during which a servicemember is absent from duty on account of sickness, wounds, leave, or other lawful cause.

content.p: The term “period of military service” means the period beginning on the date on which a servicemember enters military service and ending on the date on which the servicemember is released from military service or dies while in military service.

paragraph.heading: Dependent
paragraph.chapeau: The term “dependent”, with respect to a servicemember, means—

subparagraph.content: the servicemember’s child (as defined in section 101(4) of title 38); or
an individual for whom the servicemember provided more than one-half of the individual’s support for 180 days immediately preceding an application for relief under this chapter.

content.p: The term “court” means a court or an administrative agency of the United States or of any State (including any political subdivision of a State), whether or not a court or administrative agency of record.

subparagraph.content: a commonwealth, territory, or possession of the United States; and
with respect to a member of the armed forces, has the meaning given that term in section 101(a)(9) of title 10;
with respect to a commissioned officer of the Public Health Service, means the Secretary of Health and Human Services; and
with respect to a commissioned officer of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, means the Secretary of Commerce.

content.p: The term “motor vehicle” has the meaning given that term in section 30102(a)(6) of title 49.11 See References in Text note below.
The term “judgment” means any judgment, decree, order, or ruling, final or temporary.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Section 30102(a)(6) of title 49, referred to in par. (8), was redesignated section 30102(a)(7) of title 49 by Pub. L. 114–94, div. B, title XXIV, § 24109(b)(2), Dec. 4, 2015, 129 Stat. 1706.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 511 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 101 of act Oct. 17, 1940, ch. 888, art. I, 54 Stat. 1179; Pub. L. 92–540, title V, § 504(1), Oct. 24, 1972, 86 Stat. 1098; Pub. L. 102–12, § 9(1), Mar. 18, 1991, 105 Stat. 38; Pub. L. 107–330, title III, § 305, Dec. 6, 2002, 116 Stat. 2826, related to definitions, prior to the general amendment of this Act by Pub. L. 108–189.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2023—Par. (2)(A). Pub. L. 118–31 inserted “Space Force,” after “Marine Corps,” in introductory provisions.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section applicable to any case not final before Dec. 19, 2003, see section 3 of Pub. L. 108–189, set out as a note under section 3901 of this title.
